stemHtml: What seems to be the main role of deep (stage 3 and 4) sleep?

options.a: It ensures physical recovery, and is characterised by an alternation of dream phases and paradoxical phases.
options.b: It essentially allows for physical recovery.
options.c: Its main role is associated with memory activities and restoration of attention capabilities.
options.d: It includes physical and mental recuperation associated with fatigue.
